home.title: Purrrscribe
home.lead:
An app that turns your voice into text and your text into voice,
completely offline once it's set up.
Nothing leaves your device.
home.f1b:
Speak hands-free, watch it become text,
for as long as your device has room.
home.f2b:
Hand it any text,
articles, PDFs, ebooks,
and let it read aloud to you.
home.f3b:
Everything runs on your device.
No accounts, no cloud, no data deals.
home.privacyBody:
Most voice apps send what you say to a server.
Purrrscribe doesn't.
Your voice and your text never leave your device.
notify.title: Be first to know
notify.body:
Purrrscribe isn't out yet.
Leave your email and I'll let you know the moment it launches,
no spam, just the one message.
notify.hint: One quick step — no spam, ever.
notify.thanks: 🐾 You're on the list! I'll email you the moment Purrrscribe launches.
notify.err: Hmm, that didn't go through. Please try again, or email hello@purrrscribe.com.
about.lead:
A privacy-first voice app,
built by one stubborn Texan and five rescue cats.
about.wd1:
Purrrscribe does two things most apps make you pick between,
speak-to-text and text-to-speech,
both in one place, fully offline.
about.wd2:
Speak for as long as your device has room, in many languages, with no hidden time limits,
and watch it become text. Or hand it any text and let it read aloud to you.
Either direction, no internet required.
about.wd3:
Privacy comes first. Everything runs on your device,
your files, your text, your voice.
Nothing is sent anywhere. I genuinely can't see your data, and it's never sold or shared.
No ads. Want a backup? That's your call, on storage you choose.
about.wb1:
Hi from Texas! I'm the developer and designer behind Purrrscribe,
with plenty of kitty supervision from my five rescue cats.
about.wb2:
I'm an Army Gold Star surviving spouse with a background in Cybersecurity and DevOps.
I built Purrrscribe because I couldn't find an app that did what I needed,
both directions, fully offline, fully private.
So I built it myself.
about.wb3:
What started as a tool just for me grew into something I wanted to share, built with care,
and powered by purrrs.
If you've been looking for the same thing and couldn't find it, you're not the only one.
I built it because I needed it too.
about.wb4:
When I'm not building or designing, you'll find me singing, sewing,
or being 'gently' evicted from my own keyboard,
by a kitty who's decided it's petting o'clock. 🐾
demos.title: See it in action
demos.lead:
Two kinds of demo: hear the voices,
and try live transcription in your own language.
demos.voicesBody: Listen to a short sample of each text-to-speech voice before you ever install the app.
demos.transcribeBody:
Record a few seconds and watch Purrrscribe transcribe it,
see how accurate it is in your language.
demos.placeholder: We're working on it! 🐾 The playable demo will live right here soon.
community.title: Join the conversation
community.lead:
Ask questions, share your setup, vote on ideas — right here on the site.
You can read everything freely.
Posting uses a free GitHub account, which keeps things friendly and spam-free.
community.socialLead: Come say hi wherever you already hang out.

Questions and answers,
stuck on something? Ask here.

cat.talk.name: Purrrscribe Talk
faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.lead:
The quick answers. If yours isn't here,
the contact page is one tap away.
faq.stuckBody: Send me a message and I'll get back to you.
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead:
Send a message below and it comes straight to me.
I'm one person, so I'll reply as soon as I can,
usually within 3–5 business days.
contact.thanks: 🐾 Got it — thank you! I'll reply within 3–5 business days.
contact.err: Hmm, that didn't send. Please try again, or email me directly.
contact.a1:
Yes. After a one-time setup that downloads what you choose,
everything runs on your device, no internet needed, nothing sent anywhere.
contact.q2: Does it do both speech-to-text and text-to-speech?
contact.a2:
Both, in one app. Speak and it becomes text, or hand it text and it reads aloud,
either direction, fully offline.
contact.q3: Is there a time limit on recordings?
contact.a3:
No hidden limits. You can record for as long as your device has storage space,
full lectures included.
contact.a4:
You'll be able to choose what suits you:
a monthly plan, a yearly plan, or a one-time purchase for life.
No ads, ever.
contact.q5: Can I back up my data?
contact.a5:
Yes, and it stays in your hands,
back up to storage you choose (a USB drive, your own cloud, etc.).
Nothing is ever sent anywhere without you choosing it.
polls.note:
Pick as many options as apply, then hit Vote.
One ballot per device — totals are live for everyone. 🐾
faq.pa1:
No. The app runs fully on your device and has no backend servers.
The only internet connections are for downloading voice or language packages (one-time),
subscription verification through Google Play, and app updates.
We do not collect, store, or have access to anything you say or type.
faq.pa2:
Only what you voluntarily provide.
If you sign up for the launch notification, your email is stored to send you that one message.
If you send a contact message, your name, email, and message are stored so we can reply.
Poll votes are anonymous counts only — no personal data attached.
Nothing is shared with third parties for marketing purposes.
faq.pq3: How do the website demos work?
faq.pa3:
The demos process your voice or text sample using Hugging Face Spaces,
a cloud service — your input is sent there, processed, and returned.
It is not saved or logged by us (input logging is explicitly disabled in the build),
and is not shared with anyone.
This applies to demos only — the full app works entirely offline with downloaded packages.
faq.pq4: What still requires an internet connection?
faq.pa4:
Downloading new voice or language packages (one-time per package).
Subscription verification through Google Play (periodic, automatic).
App updates from Google Play.
Website features: demos, forms, and community comments.
Everything else — recording, transcribing, listening — works fully offline.
demos.cloudNote:
☁️ This demo processes your input using Hugging Face's cloud service — not on your device.
This applies to demos only. The full app works entirely offline.
